prompt:
---Task---
Extract entities and relationships from the input text in Data to be Processed below.

---Instructions---
1.  **Strict Adherence to Format:** Strictly adhere to all format requirements for entity and relationship lists, including output order, field delimiters, and proper noun handling, as specified in the system prompt.
2.  **Output Content Only:** Output *only* the extracted list of entities and relationships. Do not include any introductory or concluding remarks, explanations, or additional text before or after the list.
3.  **Completion Signal:** Output `<|COMPLETE|>` as the final line after all relevant entities and relationships have been extracted and presented.
4.  **Output Language:** Ensure the output language is English. Proper nouns (e.g., personal names, place names, organization names) must be kept in their original language and not translated.

---Data to be Processed---
<Entity_types>
["Person","Creature","Organization","Location","Event","Concept","Method","Content","Data","Artifact","NaturalObject"]

<Input Text>
```
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Hey Mel! Good to see you! How have you been?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Hey Caroline! Good to see you! I'm swamped with the kids & work. What's up with you? Anything new?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "I went to a LGBTQ support group yesterday and it was so powerful."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, that's cool, Caroline! What happened that was so awesome? Did you hear any inspiring stories?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "The transgender stories were so inspiring! I was so happy and thankful for all the support."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, love that painting! So cool you found such a helpful group. What's it done for you?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "The support group has made me feel accepted and given me courage to embrace myself."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "That's really cool. You've got guts. What now?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Gonna continue my edu and check out career options, which is pretty exciting!"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline! What kinda jobs are you thinkin' of? Anything that stands out?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "I'm keen on counseling or working in mental health - I'd love to support those with similar issues."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "You'd be a great counselor! Your empathy and understanding will really help the people you work with. By the way, take a look at this."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Melanie! That's really sweet. Is this your own painting?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Yeah, I painted that lake sunrise last year! It's special to me."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Wow, Melanie! The colors really blend nicely. Painting looks like a great outlet for expressing yourself."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! Painting's a fun way to express my feelings and get creative. It's a great way to relax after a long day."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Totally agree, Mel. Relaxing and expressing ourselves is key. Well, I'm off to go do some research."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Yep, Caroline. Taking care of ourselves is vital. I'm off to go swimming with the kids. Talk to you soon!"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Hey Caroline, since we last chatted, I've had a lot of things happening to me. I ran a charity race for mental health last Saturday – it was really rewarding. Really made me think about taking care of our minds."
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Caroline said: "That charity race sounds great, Mel! Making a difference & raising awareness for mental health is super rewarding - I'm really proud of you for taking part!"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! The event was really thought-provoking. I'm starting to realize that self-care is really important. It's a journey for me, but when I look after myself, I'm able to better look after my family."
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Caroline said: "I totally agree, Melanie. Taking care of ourselves is so important - even if it's not always easy. Great that you're prioritizing self-care."
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Yeah, it's tough. So I'm carving out some me-time each day - running, reading, or playing my violin - which refreshes me and helps me stay present for my fam!"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Caroline said: "That's great, Mel! Taking time for yourself is so important. You're doing an awesome job looking after yourself and your family!"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline. It's still a work in progress, but I'm doing my best. My kids are so excited about summer break! We're thinking about going camping next month. Any fun plans for the summer?"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Researching adoption agencies — it's been a dream to have a family and give a loving home to kids who need it."
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline! That's awesome! Taking in kids in need - you're so kind. Your future family is gonna be so lucky to have you!"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Mel! My goal is to give kids a loving home. I'm truly grateful for all the support I've got from friends and mentors. Now the hard work starts to turn my dream into a reality. And here's one of the adoption agencies I'm looking into. It's a lot to take in, but I'm feeling hopeful and optimistic."
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, that agency looks great! What made you pick it?"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Caroline said: "I chose them 'cause they help LGBTQ+ folks with adoption. Their inclusivity and support really spoke to me."
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Melanie said: "That's great, Caroline! Loving the inclusivity and support. Anything you're excited for in the adoption process?"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Caroline said: "I'm thrilled to make a family for kids who need one. It'll be tough as a single parent, but I'm up for the challenge!"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Melanie said: "You're doing something amazing! Creating a family for those kids is so lovely. You'll be an awesome mom! Good luck!"
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Melanie! Your kind words really mean a lot. I'll do my best to make sure these kids have a safe and loving home."
[1:14 pm on 25 May, 2023] Melanie said: "No doubts, Caroline. You have such a caring heart - they'll get all the love and stability they need! Excited for this new chapter!"
```
